title: Milkman of Walnuts Regrowth
description: Alas a pack with just the right amount of Create. Update to 1.21.1 with the addition of Create: Aeronautics and Sable!
body:
This is a modpack personally created for me and friends. It hosts a fair bit of Create and its repective addons aswell as Farmers Delight and its respective addons. Its vanilla-bean themed but it may be a bit chocolately for some peoples taste.

Versions 3.0.0 and forward are for MC version 1.21.1.

This pack was originally created via the Prism launcher and so contains overrides due to the Modrith/Curseforge blended options.

Included Curseforge overrides;
- [Advanced Chimneys](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-chimneys)
- [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)
